title: Los ladrones somos gente honrada
writer: Enrique Jardiel Poncela, Ignacio F. Iquino
actors: Amparo Rivelles, Manuel Luna, Mercedes Vecino
plot: An attempted robbery is interrupted and will be tried again by the same group. Each character's secrets will come to light as they come and go in this light Spanish comedy from the stage play by Jardiel Poncela.
